history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! We have Our World Famous Fries® available. What would you like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi there! I'm lactose intolerant and quite hungry. Could you recommend a hearty meal for me?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! For a hearty meal, we have Chicken McNuggets® (contains gluten). Would you like to order that and add any drinks or sides?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant so I can't have dairy. I'd like the Chicken McNuggets, a large order of Our World Famous Fries, and a regular soda.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is Chicken McNuggets, a large order of Our World Famous Fries, and a regular soda. The fries have no dairy listed, so this should be safe for your lactose intolerance. Please confirm your order.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that sounds perfect. Thank you for helping me.

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

documents: Black Coffee®. Perfectly brewed for any time of the day.
Iced Tea®. A blend of aromatic tea and the fruity flavour of lemon.

Chicken McNuggets®. Bite-sized pieces of breaded, boneless chicken formed in various shapes (Ball, Boot, Bell & Bone) fried and served hot with smoky Barbeque Sauce or Mustard Sauce.. Chicken bites. Each bite is better than the last.

- Suggest items from the 'Relevant menu items' block in context (if provided). Use ONLY those exact item names.

- Speak naturally like a human cashier; do not dump technical nutrition details unless asked.
- When the customer picks an item, confirm the name and ask if they want anything else (drink, fries, dessert).
- Before finalising, repeat the full order and ask for confirmation.
- If the customer mentions allergies, check allergen data from context.
